data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the quiz/assessment option.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a quiz/assessment option to confirm that users have read the policy documents. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of such a feature. The linked use case mentions the need for a quiz/assessment option, but without any supporting evidence or endpoints to confirm its existence, the requirement is deemed unmet.
gaps: No evidence of quiz/assessment option functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
